roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOT FOR BAIL HRG & ORD RELEASE DEF ON OR/BAIL REDUC FILED

/CAL:BAIL MOTION/INTORD:SPANISH/INTC/X:DEFENDANT HAS BEEN GIVEN A BED FORRESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT FATHER ALFRED'S/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD:HEARING DATE OF 09-14-21/X:FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 11-02-21/TE: 3 WEEKS/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 09-14-21/CONTD: TRIAL ON 10-22-21/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:MARK PLUMMER, SFPD/EXHMA:PEO 1) PHOTOS/EXHM:DEF A) DOCUMENT/EXHM:DEF B) VIDEO FILE/HTA1:1/BAIL:50,000/DEFTCUST3/INTC/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-20-21 (10), 10-05-21 (60)/987,2/BAIL:50000/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
